name: WWII's Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails
original_name: WWII's Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails
overview: Former marine Monty Halls retraces the routes of great escapes from Nazi territory, meeting surviving escapees and locals who risked their lives to help them.

trailers.title: TRAILER | WWII’s Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails | Catch Up On All 4
